title: Printing a Reverse Right-Angled Star Pattern

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate the use of a `for` loop to print a right-angled triangle made of stars.

The program takes the number of rows as input from the user and prints the pattern by decreasing the number of stars by one in each new row. The outer loop controls the rows in reverse order, while the inner loop prints the stars for each row.

---
